title: sterculia yatesii
intro: Sterculia yatesii, also known as the 'Yellow Gum' or 'Gamboge tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve constipation, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Sterculia yatesii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure, making it a valuable herbal remedy for cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant's resin is used to prepare herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
